description: Style Noteipanema draws inspiration from the Brazilian beach of Ipanema - it's design references the trend-setting seaside style. It takes highway fashion and mixes it with beach-bound cool. A vacay-ready look demands a pair like these lovely, colour pop flip flops. We recommend you snag more than one of these - need more reasons to buy? Supermodel Gisele Bundchen is the face of the brand!Product DetailsGold branded rubber thong straps Textured rubber footbed in cream with busy printSingle piece outsole with grooves, upraised at the heelMaterial and careRubberWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
